items.raw_desc: Társas Jungo:                Combine and discard cards firstJungo is a card game that's perfect for a quick game with family or friends. Your task will be to get rid of all the cards from your hand. Players are dealt a certain number of cards at the start, but the important rule is that they must not rearrange them in any way. The cards have a number from 1 to 8 or a pair of numbers on them. The player on the turn can play a card or set of cards to beat the one currently on the table. He can take the earned stitch or throw it away. If the player cannot or will not fold, he draws a card from the deck. The first to get rid of the cards wins. Jungo delights with its interesting design and is suitable for up to 5 players aged 10 and up. Ez az anyag különösen alkalmas kedvezőtlen környezetben való használatra, ahol kiváló korrózióállóságával tűnik ki. It contains 2 filters, one for studying the surface of the Moon and the other for observing Mars, Jupiter and Saturn. They effectively increase the image contrast and allow more detailed observation of astronomical phenomena. They have a 1.25" diameter tube. The optical red filter has a low light transmission, making it effective for stargazing telescopes with apertures of 150 mm or larger. It offers detailed observations of the polar caps, dust clouds, the Martian sea and the blue clouds of Saturn and Jupiter. The lunar filter for lunar observation reduces the brightness, allowing you to examine the lunar surface in more detail. Its use is ideal when the moon phase is greater than 80% and during the full moon. Works with stargazing telescopes of any aperture. It doesn't strain the eyes.
